body:
APPROVE
Clean, focused implementation. Parser package is well-documented with conservative exhaustion heuristic matching the bead's "zero remaining" spec, middleware is no-op when observer is unset, and the service-layer wiring threads the observer through registry.Inputs without disturbing existing factories. Test coverage spans positive/negative/edge (per-axis min, HTTP-date Retry-After, nil headers, Retry-After precedence).
artifact: .ddx/executions/20260503T011025-5ac41a9b/reviewer-stream.log
